description: CompositionThree-fourth tights made of a stretchable polyester fabric, with soft and broad elastic waist, engineered with Formotion and Climacool technology and embroidered logo on left upper thighFittingRegularWash careHand wash or machine washDesigned for that absolute comfort during work outs, this capri tights from adidas is created using materials that ensure you have a fresh and comfortable feel all through. Engineered using a soft, stretchable polyester fabric, the tights stay snug and comfortably on the body. The Formotion technology employed offers superior Fit and comfort, allowing the body to move naturally. Well ventilated, the ClimaCool allows you to stay dry and fresh all through the wear, while the embroidered brand logo adds to the tights a sense of style. If you wish to go casual, simply pair it with lifestyle shoes and a long, stylish top.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
